messages.content:
\subsection{Evolution of Validation Metrics during RL}
% 在Figure~\ref{rl_validation}中绘制了Qwen3-VL-4B和Qwen3-VL-8B用OS-Themis作为奖励方法进行训练时，在验证集上Reward变化情况。验证集的Reward由Rule-based方法和OS-Themis共同给出，既能反应和训练分布的一致性，也能反应和真实分布的一致性。
Figure~\ref{fig:rl_validation} illustrates the evolution of validation rewards for Qwen3-VL-4B and Qwen3-VL-8B trained using OS-Themis as the reward framework. The validation rewards are jointly derived from rule-based methods and OS-Themis, reflecting consistency with both the training distribution and the ground-truth distribution.
%从图中可以看出曲线存在震荡的情况，这是由于验证时间成本比较高，且验证集数量较少，导致会出现明显的波动。翻译下下面这句

From the figure, we can observe oscillations in the curves, which are attributed to the high computational cost of validation and the limited size of the validation set, leading to notable fluctuations.

\section{Prompt}
% 为了测试OS-Themis的效果，我们实验尝试了多套Prompt，我们用Qwen3-VL系列在实际应用中不断测试，结合实际实验当中遇到的错误问题不断进行修正，最终得到了一套稳定可靠的Prompt。
To evaluate the effectiveness of OS-Themis, we experimented with multiple prompt variations. Through continuous practical testing using the Qwen3-VL series and iterative refinements based on errors encountered during actual experiments, we ultimately established a stable and reliable prompt.
%具体的Prompt如Table~\ref{tab:selector_agent_prompts_combined},Table~\ref{tab:verifier_agent_prompts_combined},Table~\ref{tab:reviewer_agent_prompts_combined},Table~\ref{tab:judge_agent_prompts_combined}所示。其中Selector Agent有两套Prompt，一套为刚开始时选取Milestone，鼓励其尝试。另一套为在后续中加入之前选取的Milestone历史，避免重复选择。翻译下最后这句

The specific prompts are shown in Table~\ref{tab:selector_agent_prompts_combined}, Table~\ref{tab:verifier_agent_prompts_combined}, Table~\ref{tab:reviewer_agent_prompts_combined}, and Table~\ref{tab:judge_agent_prompts_combined}. Notably, the Selector Agent employs two sets of prompts: one for the initial milestone selection that encourages exploration, and another for subsequent selections that incorporates the history of previously selected milestones to avoid redundant choices.

\caption{Performance comparison of different modules (Selector, Reviewer, Judge, Verifier) on the OS-Themis framework. The base model is Qwen3-VL-8B using Qwen3-VL-235B as the oracle. \textbf{Bold} indicates the best result.}翻译下
\caption{OS-Themis框架中不同模块(Selector、Reviewer、Judge、Verifier)的性能比较。基础模型为Qwen3-VL-8B,使用Qwen3-VL-235B作为预言机。\textbf{粗体}表示最佳结果。}
\caption{OS-Themis框架中不同模块(Selector、Reviewer、Judge、Verifier)的性能比较。基础模型为Qwen3-VL-8B,在选中的Agent上使用Qwen3-VL-235B，其余不变。\textbf{粗体}表示最佳结果。}

\caption{Performance comparison of different modules (Selector, Reviewer, Judge, Verifier) in the OS-Themis framework. The base model is Qwen3-VL-8B, with Qwen3-VL-235B used for the selected agent while keeping others unchanged. \textbf{Bold} indicates the best result.}
